content.heroSubtitle: Strategic financial consulting and operational architecture for high-growth businesses.
content.aboutText: With over 19 years of experience across industries, including 13 years at Hike, I've operated as the person founders rely on when execution matters most.
content.aboutText2: I joined as a Finance Manager and went on to serve as Chief Financial Officer, building and leading the finance function through every stage of growth. During that time, I built the finance organization from the ground up, co-led fundraising and M&A transactions end-to-end, supported a business pivot that scaled to ~US$500M GMV. Managed the financial and operational architecture of the transition.

benefits.title: Pitch Deck Making
benefits.description: Comprehensive pitch deck creation including financial modeling, market sizing, and narrative structuring for Series A/B rounds.

benefits.title: 1-to-1 Financial Report Discussion
benefits.description: Deep dive into your monthly/quarterly financials to identify operational bottlenecks and growth levers.

services.title: Financial Architecture
services.description: Building robust finance organizations from the ground up to support massive scale.

services.title: Multi-jurisdictional
services.description: Managing complex entity structures, compliance, and operations across global markets.

services.title: Strategic Governance
services.description: Cross-functional leadership spanning legal, business development, and governance.

faqs.question: What is your typical engagement model?
faqs.answer: We typically engage on a retainer basis for fractional CFO services or on a project basis for specific M&A or fundraising transactions.

faqs.question: Do you work with startups?
faqs.answer: Yes, we specialize in high-growth startups from Series A through pre-IPO stages.

faqs.question: How do you handle multi-jurisdictional compliance?
faqs.answer: With extensive experience across the US, GCC, and India, we build scalable entity structures and partner with local legal experts to ensure full compliance while optimizing tax and operational efficiency.

faqs.question: Can you help us prepare for a Series B fundraise?
faqs.answer: Absolutely. We manage the entire process from financial modeling and narrative structuring to investor outreach, due diligence, and deal negotiation.

faqs.question: What is the difference between a Fractional CFO and an Interim CFO?
faqs.answer: A Fractional CFO works with you part-time on a long-term basis to provide strategic guidance. An Interim CFO steps in full-time for a short period to bridge a leadership gap or manage a specific transition.
